description: FastAPI web chat channel with access-code authentication, WebSocket relay to channel-server, session persistence, plugin KB integration, and CINNOX-branded chat UI

key_symbols.name: ROOT
key_symbols.description: Project root path (parent of web/)

key_symbols.name: STATIC
key_symbols.description: Static files directory path (web/static/)

key_symbols.name: SESSIONS_DIR
key_symbols.description: Session persistence directory (.autoservice/database/sessions)

key_symbols.name: LEADS_DIR
key_symbols.description: Leads storage directory (.autoservice/database/knowledge_base/leads)

key_symbols.name: ADMIN_KEY
key_symbols.description: Admin API key from env or auto-generated token

key_symbols.name: lifespan
key_symbols.description: FastAPI lifespan context manager: starts idle_purge_loop, discovers plugins, mounts plugin HTTP routes, prints startup banner

key_symbols.name: app
key_symbols.description: FastAPI application instance (title='AutoService Web')

key_symbols.name: page_index
key_symbols.description: GET / - redirects to /login

key_symbols.name: page_login
key_symbols.description: GET /login - serves login.html

key_symbols.name: page_chat
key_symbols.description: GET /chat - serves chat.html from plugin static dirs or built-in static; raises 404 if none found

key_symbols.name: serve_explain
key_symbols.description: GET /explain/{path} - serves generated explain flow visualization HTML pages from .autoservice/explain/

key_symbols.name: api_kb_search
key_symbols.description: GET /api/kb_search - knowledge base search endpoint with query, top_k, source_filter, countries parameters

key_symbols.name: api_route_query
key_symbols.description: GET /api/route_query - routes a customer query returning domain/region/role JSON

key_symbols.name: api_save_lead
key_symbols.description: POST /api/save_lead - saves collected lead data with tolerant JSON parsing; supports new_customer/existing_customer/partner types

key_symbols.name: api_list_sessions
key_symbols.description: GET /api/sessions - lists up to 50 sessions for authenticated user (requires valid token)

key_symbols.name: api_get_session
key_symbols.description: GET /api/sessions/{session_id} - retrieves session detail by ID (requires valid token)

key_symbols.name: api_changelog
key_symbols.description: GET /api/changelog - returns version and content from CHANGELOG.md with EN/ZH i18n support

key_symbols.name: configure
key_symbols.description: Sets admin_key, idle_timeout_seconds, and auth_file path; called by app.py at startup

key_symbols.name: _Code
key_symbols.description: Dataclass representing an access code with code, expires_at, label, status, created_at fields; has is_usable property

key_symbols.name: get_code_for_token
key_symbols.description: Returns the access code associated with a session token

key_symbols.name: touch_token
key_symbols.description: Updates the idle-timeout clock for a token (called on each user message)

key_symbols.name: save_auth
key_symbols.description: Persists all auth state (codes, tokens, mappings) to auth_store.json

key_symbols.name: load_auth
key_symbols.description: Loads auth state from auth_store.json on startup

key_symbols.name: _evict_token
key_symbols.description: Removes a session token and releases the code's exclusive lock

key_symbols.name: purge
key_symbols.description: Marks expired codes, cleans up expired/idle tokens, saves state if changed

key_symbols.name: idle_purge_loop
key_symbols.description: Background async task sweeping idle/expired tokens every 60 seconds

key_symbols.name: valid_token
key_symbols.description: Validates a session token (calls purge first to evict stale tokens)

key_symbols.name: admin_new_code
key_symbols.description: GET /admin/new-code handler - generates a single 8-char access code; requires admin key

key_symbols.name: admin_batch_codes
key_symbols.description: GET /admin/batch-codes handler - batch generates 1-50 access codes; requires admin key

key_symbols.name: admin_list_codes
key_symbols.description: GET /admin/codes handler - lists all access codes with status; requires admin key

key_symbols.name: auth_verify
key_symbols.description: POST /auth/verify handler - verifies access code, enforces exclusive-lock (one session per code), returns session token

key_symbols.name: auth_logout
key_symbols.description: POST /auth/logout handler - evicts token and releases code lock

key_symbols.name: configure
key_symbols.description: Sets search paths for KB and route query scripts based on project root

key_symbols.name: get_kb_search
key_symbols.description: Lazy-loads and returns the KB search module from configured search paths

key_symbols.name: get_route_query
key_symbols.description: Lazy-loads and returns the route query module from configured search paths

key_symbols.name: presearch_kb
key_symbols.description: Pre-searches KB before calling Claude, injects results into prompt as context; returns (augmented_prompt, hit_count); skips for short inputs (<12 chars) or when gate not cleared

key_symbols.name: configure
key_symbols.description: Sets the sessions directory path; called by app.py

key_symbols.name: new_web_session_id
key_symbols.description: Generates a new session ID with timestamp format session_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS

key_symbols.name: session_dir_for_code
key_symbols.description: Returns per-code subdirectory under SESSIONS_DIR (creates if needed); anonymous codes map to _anonymous bucket

key_symbols.name: infer_session_meta
key_symbols.description: Infers customer_type (new_customer/existing_customer/partner/unknown) and resolution (abandoned/transferred) from conversation text using keyword matching; scans user messages for type, all messages for resolution

key_symbols.name: save_session_data
key_symbols.description: Saves session JSON to per-code subdirectory

key_symbols.name: load_session_data
key_symbols.description: Loads session data by ID with fast path (code_hint) and fallback (scan all subdirectories)

key_symbols.name: configure
key_symbols.description: Sets channel-server WebSocket URL; called by app.py

key_symbols.name: WebChannelBridge
key_symbols.description: Singleton that maintains a single WS connection to channel-server and multiplexes all browser sessions over it; handles registration, receive loop, subscribe/unsubscribe by chat_id, ping/pong

key_symbols.name: WebChannelBridge.ensure_connected
key_symbols.description: Connects to channel-server, sends register message with chat_ids=['web_*'], waits for ack, starts receive loop

key_symbols.name: WebChannelBridge._receive_loop
key_symbols.description: Async receive loop: demultiplexes incoming messages by chat_id to subscriber queues; handles ping/pong; notifies all subscribers on disconnect

key_symbols.name: WebChannelBridge.subscribe
key_symbols.description: Creates and returns an asyncio.Queue for a chat_id

key_symbols.name: WebChannelBridge.unsubscribe
key_symbols.description: Removes subscriber queue for a chat_id

key_symbols.name: WebChannelBridge.send_message
key_symbols.description: Sends a JSON message over the bridge connection

key_symbols.name: _get_bridge
key_symbols.description: Returns module-level singleton WebChannelBridge instance, ensuring it is connected

key_symbols.name: ws_generic
key_symbols.description: WS /ws handler - accepts connection, sends error message directing to /ws/chat, then closes

key_symbols.name: ws_chat
key_symbols.description: WS /ws/chat handler - authenticated chat relay: validates token, inits session, connects to bridge, runs 3 concurrent tasks (browser_to_server, server_to_browser, heartbeat)

key_symbols.name: verify()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: sends access code to /auth/verify, stores token in sessionStorage, redirects to /chat on success

key_symbols.name: toggleLang()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: toggles between EN/ZH localization

key_symbols.name: showInUse()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: shows banner when access code is in use by another session (HTTP 409)

files_analyzed.notes: Access code login page with EN/ZH i18n, error handling for expired/invalid/in-use codes, fetches changelog version

key_symbols.name: connect()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: connects to generic /ws endpoint with auto-reconnect

key_symbols.name: handleMessage()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: handles chunk/done/error message types from WebSocket

key_symbols.name: sendMessage()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: sends user input as JSON message over WebSocket

files_analyzed.notes: Minimal dark-themed debug/terminal-style chat UI connecting to /ws generic endpoint; Chinese UI text

key_symbols.name: connect()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: connects to /ws/cinnox WebSocket, sends auth token+mode on open

key_symbols.name: handleMsg()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: message dispatcher handling ready, session_resumed, agent_joined, turn_meta, thinking, bot_text_delta, kb_searching, kb_sources, subagent_start, subagent_result, bot_text, done, session_ended, error, heartbeat types

key_symbols.name: send()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: sends user message; queues if AI is responding (non-blocking queue mode)

key_symbols.name: switchMode()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: switches between sales/service mode, resets chat, reconnects WebSocket

key_symbols.name: resumeSession()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: sends resume_session command to restore a previous chat session

key_symbols.name: loadSessions()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: fetches /api/sessions and populates session history sidebar

key_symbols.name: openSessionModal()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: fetches session detail and displays it in a modal with conversation replay and resume button

key_symbols.name: parseLeadHints()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: detects lead info (customer type, name/company/email/phone) from bot message text to update sidebar field ticks

key_symbols.name: parseServiceHints()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: detects service account info (account ID, agent name, service no, issue) from bot messages

key_symbols.name: buildKbCard()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: creates collapsible KB sources card showing search query and results

key_symbols.name: buildSubagentCard()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: creates collapsible subagent trace card showing agent names, elapsed times, result previews

key_symbols.name: I18N
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: full EN/ZH localization dictionary for all UI strings

key_symbols.name: endSession()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: sends end_session message via WebSocket

key_symbols.name: logout()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: calls /auth/logout, clears sessionStorage, redirects to /login

key_symbols.name: showChangelog()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: renders CHANGELOG.md content in a modal via marked.js

key_symbols.name: toggleSidebar()
key_symbols.description: JavaScript: toggles mobile sidebar visibility

files_analyzed.notes: Full-featured CINNOX-branded chat UI with header, chat column, sidebar (session info, lead/account fields, KB stats, access info, session history), session detail modal, changelog modal, mobile responsive layout, markdown rendering via marked.js, message queueing, WebSocket watchdog, human agent support
Minified marked.js library for markdown-to-HTML rendering in cinnox.html

interfaces.name: GET /admin/batch-codes?key=&count=&expires_in=&label=
interfaces.description: Batch generate 1-50 access codes (admin key required)

interfaces.name: GET /admin/codes?key=
interfaces.description: List all access codes with status (admin key required)

interfaces.name: POST /auth/verify
interfaces.description: Verify access code, return session token; enforces exclusive lock

interfaces.name: POST /auth/logout
interfaces.description: Release session token and code lock

interfaces.name: WS /ws/chat
interfaces.description: Authenticated chat WebSocket with channel-server relay

interfaces.name: WS /ws/cinnox
interfaces.description: Alias for /ws/chat used by cinnox.html plugin chat page

interfaces.name: GET /api/changelog?lang=
interfaces.description: Get changelog version and content with i18n

dependencies.name: fastapi
dependencies.imports: FastAPI, HTTPException, Query, Request, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect, RedirectResponse, FileResponse, StaticFiles

dependencies.name: web.auth
dependencies.imports: auth module (configure, load_auth, valid_token, get_code_for_token, touch_token, idle_purge_loop, admin_new_code, admin_batch_codes, admin_list_codes, auth_verify, auth_logout)

dependencies.name: web.session_persistence
dependencies.imports: sessions module (configure, session_dir_for_code, new_web_session_id, save_session_data, load_session_data)

dependencies.name: marked.js
dependencies.imports: Minified JS library loaded via script tag for markdown rendering

test_results.note: 2 async tests exist: test_web_bridge_connects_and_registers (verifies WebChannelBridge registration with mock channel-server) and test_web_bridge_demuxes_replies (verifies chat_id-based message demultiplexing). Tests use websockets library to create mock servers.

user_flows.name: Access Code Login
steps: User navigates to / which redirects to /login (app.py:137)
login.html renders access code input form (login.html:1)
User enters 8-char code, clicks Continue (login.html:233 verify())
Frontend POSTs to /auth/verify with code (auth.py:245)
Server validates code, checks exclusive lock, generates session token (auth.py:245-277)
On success, frontend stores token in sessionStorage and redirects to /chat (login.html:252-256)
On HTTP 409 (code in use), frontend shows in-use banner with remaining minutes (login.html:257-260)

user_flows.name: Authenticated Chat Session
steps: GET /chat serves cinnox.html from plugin or built-in static (app.py:147)
cinnox.html checks sessionStorage for token, redirects to /login if missing (cinnox.html:898)
Frontend opens WebSocket to /ws/cinnox (cinnox.html:1266 connect())
ws_chat handler accepts connection, awaits first message with token (websocket.py:143-155)
Server validates token, initializes session state, sends 'ready' message (websocket.py:170-188)
Server connects to channel-server via WebChannelBridge singleton (websocket.py:191-199)
Three concurrent tasks run: browser_to_server, server_to_browser, heartbeat (websocket.py:303-311)
User sends message -> browser_to_server forwards to channel-server (websocket.py:253-258)
Channel-server reply arrives -> server_to_browser sends bot_text_delta + done to browser (websocket.py:260-281)
Frontend renders streaming bot response with markdown (cinnox.html:1398-1418)
Frontend updates sidebar: customer type, lead info, KB stats (cinnox.html:1519-1522)

user_flows.name: Session Resume
steps: User clicks session in sidebar history list (cinnox.html:1876)
Frontend fetches GET /api/sessions/{id} to show detail modal (cinnox.html:1884)
User clicks Resume button in modal (cinnox.html:1926 resumeSession())
Frontend sends resume_session message with web_session_id over WebSocket (cinnox.html:1935)
Server loads old session data via session_persistence.load_session_data (websocket.py:221-222)
Server sends session_resumed with history, mode, customer_type, agent state (websocket.py:226-238)
Frontend replays conversation history and restores sidebar state (cinnox.html:1316-1358)

user_flows.name: End Session and Logout
steps: User clicks End Session button (cinnox.html:1646 endSession())
Frontend sends end_session message over WebSocket (cinnox.html:1648)
Server sets resolution to 'resolved', saves session, sends session_ended (websocket.py:213-217)
Frontend disables input, shows 'session ended' message (cinnox.html:1537-1540)
User clicks Exit button (cinnox.html:1654 logout())
Frontend POSTs to /auth/logout to release code lock (auth.py:280-285)
Frontend clears sessionStorage, redirects to /login (cinnox.html:1660-1661)

user_flows.name: KB Search (HTTP API)
steps: Client calls GET /api/kb_search?query=...&top_k=10 (app.py:181)
plugin_kb.get_kb_search() lazy-loads KB search module from configured paths (plugin_kb.py:37-48)
Search results filtered and returned as JSON array with source_name, section, content, score (app.py:193-201)

user_flows.name: Admin Code Management
steps: Admin calls GET /admin/new-code?key=ADMIN_KEY to generate single code (auth.py:162)
Admin calls GET /admin/batch-codes?key=ADMIN_KEY&count=5 to batch generate codes (auth.py:190)
Admin calls GET /admin/codes?key=ADMIN_KEY to list all codes with status (auth.py:228)
All endpoints require ADMIN_KEY query parameter for authorization

user_flows.name: Mode Switching (Sales/Service)
steps: User clicks Sales AI or Support AI tab in header (cinnox.html:747-748)
switchMode() checks if AI is responding (blocks if so) (cinnox.html:1163-1170)
Closes existing WebSocket, resets chat and sidebar (cinnox.html:1174-1208)
Calls connect() to establish new WebSocket with selected mode (cinnox.html:1210)
Server receives mode in auth message, initializes session with that mode (websocket.py:165-167)

architecture_notes.pattern: Module-level configuration via configure() functions called from app.py at import time
architecture_notes.multiplexing: All browser WebSocket sessions are multiplexed over a single WebSocket connection to channel-server via WebChannelBridge singleton (websocket.py:35). Each browser gets a unique chat_id='web_{session_id}' and replies are demuxed by chat_id.
architecture_notes.auth_model: Access code -> session token flow with exclusive lock (one active session per code). Idle timeout purging runs in background asyncio task.
architecture_notes.persistence: Session data persisted as JSON files in per-code subdirectories under .autoservice/database/sessions/. Auth state persisted to .autoservice/database/auth_store.json.
architecture_notes.plugin_integration: app.py discovers plugins via autoservice.plugin_loader.discover() and mounts their HTTP routes. Chat page (GET /chat) checks plugin static dirs for chat.html before falling back to built-in.
architecture_notes.i18n: Full English/Chinese localization in both login.html and cinnox.html using data-i18n attributes and dictionary lookup
